name: refactor-chain
description: refactor-chain v4 — a self-diagnosing, self-healing fix-it pipeline. One door (/refactor, /fix, /check) detects what a codebase needs (tidy structure / modernize / fix a bug / improve UI), routes to the right lane of 57 native refactor-* skills, proves behavior is preserved at every step (baseline + verify + review gate + guidelines gate), and explains itself in plain language. Universal language registry (40+ languages classified by family, variants, and frameworks — first-class C, C++, Erlang, Elixir, Rust, Go, Python, .NET, JVM, BEAM, Apple/mobile, COBOL/Fortran and more, plus embedded-platform detection), principle-driven structural engine (SOLID and beyond, user-chosen), guidelines extract/audit/conform engine, deterministic detection + resumable state machine + 6 dormant-until-active hooks + mid-session decision checkpoints + self-improvement loop + an on-demand multi-agent review board (parallel role-lenses, adversarially verified).
